name: part_005
file: tmp_【3D LIVE】ゲスト多数 &超告知＆新衣装あり‼ さくらみこ生誕祭2026＂ Fashion Beat ＂ 🌸【 #さくらみこ生誕祭2 [B3OxuRMofcM]_gemini-3-flash-preview\reencoded\part_005.mov

scenes.description: Sakura Miko continues her performance of 'Kimi Iro'.
Costume change sequence with visual effects as Sakura Miko changes into a new outfit.
Sakura Miko and Nakiri Ayame perform a cover of 'Seishoujo Ryouiki'.

subtitles.original: 君色　教えて　color
subtitles.english: Tell me your color

subtitles.original: そんな感じで　イェイ　イェイ　イェイ　イェイ
subtitles.english: Just like that, yeah yeah yeah yeah

subtitles.original: 夢のビート　刻もうよ
subtitles.english: Let's carve out the beat of our dreams

subtitles.original: さわげー！
subtitles.english: Make some noise!

subtitles.original: 咲き誇れ！　ソレ　ソレ　ソレ　ソレ
subtitles.english: Bloom in full glory! Heave-ho!

subtitles.original: だから歌いたい　今のフェスティバル
subtitles.english: That's why I want to sing at today's festival

subtitles.original: 祭り囃子で　ノリノリせい！
subtitles.english: Get into the groove with the festival music!

subtitles.original: 笑顔満開　無限大
subtitles.english: Smiles in full bloom, infinitely

subtitles.original: It's Alright!
subtitles.english: It's Alright!

subtitles.original: 舞い上がれ！　ソレ　ソレ　ソレ　ソレ
subtitles.english: Soar high! Heave-ho!

subtitles.original: 君色　教えて　color
subtitles.english: Tell me your color

subtitles.original: そんな感じで　イェイ　イェイ　イェイ　イェイ
subtitles.english: Just like that, yeah yeah yeah yeah

subtitles.original: 夢のビート　響かせてよ
subtitles.english: Let the beat of our dreams resonate

subtitles.original: だから止まらない！
subtitles.english: So I won't stop!

subtitles.original: はっ！
subtitles.english: Ha!

subtitles.original: それ！　ソレ　ソレ　ソレ！
subtitles.english: There! Heave-ho!

subtitles.original: どっこいしょー！　どっこいしょー！
subtitles.english: Dokkoisho! Dokkoisho!

subtitles.original: まだ云わないで呪文めいたその言葉
subtitles.english: Don't say those spell-like words just yet

subtitles.original: “愛”なんて羽のように軽いささやき
subtitles.english: Something like "love" is a whisper light as a feather

subtitles.original: パパよりやさしく手なずけてあげるわ
subtitles.english: I'll tame you more gently than a father would

subtitles.original: 覚悟があるならば
subtitles.english: If you have the resolve

subtitles.original: 百万の薔薇のベッドに埋もれ眠る夢よりも
subtitles.english: More than a dream of sleeping buried in a bed of a million roses

subtitles.original: 馨しく私は生きてるの
subtitles.english: I am living fragrantly

subtitles.original: 汚れたこの世界　汚れずに
subtitles.english: In this tainted world, without becoming tainted

subtitles.original: 羽ばたいていけるのか
subtitles.english: Can one go on fluttering their wings?

subtitles.original: ひとり真夜中
subtitles.english: Alone in the middle of the night

subtitles.original: 学び続けても
subtitles.english: Even if I continue to learn

subtitles.original: 水晶の星空は
subtitles.english: The crystal starry sky

subtitles.original: 遠すぎるの
subtitles.english: Is far too distant

subtitles.original: まだ触れないでその震える指先は
subtitles.english: Don't touch me yet, those trembling fingertips are

subtitles.original: 花盗人の甘いためらい
subtitles.english: The sweet hesitation of a flower thief

subtitles.original: 触れてもいいこの深い胸の奥まで
subtitles.english: You may touch, even to the depths of this heart

subtitles.original: その自信があるならば
subtitles.english: If you have that confidence

subtitles.original: 白馬の王子様なんて
subtitles.english: Someone like a prince on a white horse

subtitles.original: 信じてるわけじゃない
subtitles.english: It's not like I believe in that

subtitles.original: ひび割れたガラスケースに飾られた純潔は
subtitles.english: The purity displayed in a cracked glass case is

subtitles.original: 滅びゆく天使たちの心臓
subtitles.english: The hearts of perishing angels

subtitles.original: また明日も目覚めるたびに
subtitles.english: Every time I wake up tomorrow as well

subtitles.original: 百年の時を知る
subtitles.english: I realize the passage of a hundred years

subtitles.original: 眠れない魂の茨姫
subtitles.english: The Briar Rose of a sleepless soul

subtitles.original: 食い込む冠
subtitles.english: The crown digging in

subtitles.original: 一滴の血の滴
subtitles.english: A single drop of blood

subtitles.original: いま真真実と現実を思い知るの
subtitles.english: Now I realize the truth and reality

subtitles.original: まだ行かないで月明かりの結界で
subtitles.english: Don't go yet, within the barrier of moonlight

subtitles.original: 過ちに気づいてしまいそう
subtitles.english: I feel like I might realize my mistake

subtitles.original: 安らかな温もりだか...
subtitles.english: This peaceful warmth...
